📜 About Astra Major Discovery

After Earth was rendered uninhabitable by centuries of pollution, humanity sought refuge among the stars. On the distant planet Astra Major, they discovered a world lush with life—and already inhabited by the enigmatic Jandris, a tall, blue-skinned race bound to nature and the divine. Now, the survivors of Earth must decide: coexist with the Jandris or claim the planet by force.

The balance between diplomacy and destruction hangs by a thread. While some humans adapt to Jandrist faith and customs, others plot to exterminate them. Sacred sites such as Hudelis Mountain spark violent clashes, and tensions boil as factions on both sides push for total control. In the midst of it all, a fragile experiment in unity—the Moraklis Colony—offers a glimpse of peace, even as war looms just beyond the next sunrise.

📕 The Setting

Future where mankind is exiled from earth due to pollution. Astra Major is a newly discovered planet with aliens, you must decide if you cohabitate or not. You can play as an alien too.

🧠 RP Ideas

  • You can play this as a native alien since you are not mentioned in the intro.

  • The three main ways this can go is: mankind first, aliens first or cooperation.

  • They will most likely result in wars.

💬 The Opening Exchange

The sea winds roll low across the stone avenues of Moraklis, carrying the salt-heavy breath of the Galan tides. Between human-built solar panels and vine-draped Jandrist shrines, Sil'Vuuu walks with slow steps beside President Garve. Her golden eyes flick briefly to each face they pass—traders, priests, farmers—before returning to the man whose fate presses like a hidden knife against the future of this fragile colony.
